The Offer
• Your offer is CRITICAL
• When things go wrong in a launch, it’s usually a problem with the
offer. Not always... but most of the time.
• We’re going to fix that on this call so that doesn’t happen to you.
• If you really really REALLY absorb the lessons from Module One and
the lessons in this Module, then you have won the game.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 45 --

• Recordings and other goodies are being posted in the members area

Your Offer: the Big Lesson
Your offer is all about the TRANSFORMATION 	or the
RESULTS 	that your client will experience... it’s not
about the actual STUFF you will deliver to them
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 45 --

What is important to you about this training?
• Whether it’s a teleseminar or webinar or video course?
• Whether these slides are fancy or not?
• Whether it’s 3 calls or 5 calls or 10 calls?
• Whether we use a Facebook group or a private forum?
• Whether the videos are WMV or MOV or MP4 format?
• Whether the calls are twice a week or once a week?
Would any of those have changed whether you
registered for the course or not?
www.getwsodownload.com

Connecting With Your Avatar
• These next set of questions will will give you the insights to create
your offer - they’ll be the fuel for your launch
• You need to picture your avatar in your mind’s eye
• We’re going to move through these questions quickly... do your best
and then circle back

Now Let’s Work On Your Offer...
• Remember, it’s all about the transformation or the result that your
clients will get from your work
• Think about your greatest Case Study or success story
• If you don’t have a GREAT one yet, then simply imagine who it will be
• EVEN BETTER: after this call... go interview your greatest Case Study
and ask them these questions
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 22 of 45 --

So... for these next questions, really
think about your greatest Case
Study... now or in the future
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 23 of 45 --

Transformation and Results
• How has your product positively impacted their life? How is their life
different now because of your product? Look into the future - a year, 5
years, 10 years... be as SPECIFIC and CONCRETE as possible
• What will it cost your avatar to NOT have your product? What extra
pain and frustration? How much money? What will they miss out on?
Look into the future - a year, 5 years, 10 years... be as SPECIFIC and
CONCRETE as possible
• Who will your avatar become as a result of the positive impact of
your product? Look into the future - a year, 5 years, 10 years... be as
SPECIFIC and CONCRETE as possible
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 24 of 45 --

transformation or result that your
clients are going to receive from
your product or service?

Examples
• Seed Launch Deep Dive: do a product launch even if you don’t have a
list or a product.
• Learn Guitar: learn to play 10 songs good enough so you can
confidently play for your friends at your next party

-- 34 of 45 --

The “Stuff”
• Remember, the transformation or changes or results are what REALLY
matters - it has 80% of the impact on your offer
• The other 20% is your “deliverables” - this is the “stuff” that people
get - like videos, teleseminars, books, DVDs, consultations, etc..
• Deliverables (what they get)
• Bonuses (bonus stuff they get)
• Price and terms
• Guarantee
• IMPORTANT: you can just “sketch this in” for now!!!
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 35 of 45 --

The Ideal Seed Offer
• A series of five teleseminars or webinars
• Recordings
• Transcripts
• A bonus Question and Answer call
• (On our fourth call I’ll cover all the mechanics of how
to actually do all this... for today, we’re just talking about
the offer)
• REMEMBER: this is the “stuff” that we’re talking about
now. It only counts for 20%... the transformation or
change or result is what really counts)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 36 of 45 --

Bonuses
• You can get creative
• Can be flipped
• Can be added or taken away at any point
• Great place to fill gaps
• Great place to raise and answer objections
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 37 of 45 --

Guarantee
• Stronger is almost always better
• Normal vs. Conditional
• Refunds will happen (they’re not a reflection of your self-worth)
www.getwsodownload.com

Pricing
• Live vs not live
• Anchoring
• Testing is always the answer (but it’s difficult)
• Price and positioning
• Where do you enter the market?
• Seed Launch pricing vs. follow-on product pricing
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 41 of 45 --

Your Price
• Seed Launch and the launch process generally allows you to be at the
high end of the market
• Compete on value, not on price
• Compete on connection, not on price
• Look at what others are charging
• I want to be somewhere in the range of the high-end service
providers
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 42 of 45 --

Your Seed Launch Objective
• Create a great product
• Momentum
• Test your product idea
• Build a little buzz
• So... you want a critical mass
• Remember, you’re the one making the rules
• Don’t be afraid to have different pricing for different groups
• Don’t be afraid to comp some people into your program
www.getwsodownload.com

• REMEMBER! This is about progress, not perfection!
• Brainstorm ten possible one-sentence transformation-
based product descriptions (they can be for different
products)
